title: ranunculus subtenuis
intro: Ranunculus subtenuis, a lesser-known species of the ranunculus genus, is a flowering plant that is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to be effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Ranunculus subtenuis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable resource in natural remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
